title: The Sino-Vietnamese dispute over territorial claims, 1974-1978: Vietnamese nationalism and its consequences
strengths: Provides a compact scholarly summary of committed forces and casualties for the 1979 invasion window.
limitations: Secondary synthesis rather than a dedicated operational casualty monograph; exact sourcing chain should be checked in a later pass.
notes: Best concise scholarly quantitative anchor recovered in this rerun.

title: The 1979 Sino-Vietnamese War and Its Consequences
strengths: Provides a clean invasion window and rough corroborative casualty scale.
limitations: Casualty figures are explicitly broad and unverified.
notes: Used as an upper-bound plausibility check rather than the main best estimate.

title: Sino-Vietnamese War, 1979
strengths: Useful for province-specific framing and distinguishing regular combat forces from broader defenders.
limitations: Not a dedicated casualty dataset and includes multiple contested estimates.
notes: Used mainly to support the corridor framing and defender composition.

title: Remembering Vietnam's bloody border war with China
strengths: Provides Vietnamese retrospective reporting on the 1979 invasion and a named civilian massacre case.
limitations: Retrospective feature, not a formal casualty dataset.
notes: Used mainly for Tong Chup corroboration and invasion context.

title: Past tragic stories spur peace efforts
variables_supported: Tong Chup victim count and victim profile
strengths: Corroborates the 43-victim massacre figure and emphasizes women/children among the dead.
limitations: Retrospective memorial journalism, not a contemporaneous battlefield record.
notes: Used as a second corroborating Tong Chup source.

title: February 17th of 1979: China launched an attack on Vietnam, igniting the 1979 Northern border war
pages_or_sections: article body, lines around 46 and location passage
strengths: Gives the massacre date, the 43-victim count, and local administrative context.
limitations: Retrospective news source; location wording should be rechecked in a later archival pass.
notes: Used as the third corroborating Tong Chup source and for the micro-episode date.
